prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for pyridine (11 atoms: N×1, C×5, H×5) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF, tier 'standard') in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied XYZ file. N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Partial charges via Mulliken scheme (PySCF). Integrity: trustworthy=true; sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f−)=1.0000. No warnings reported. Headline value reported is the largest f+ index, located on the nitrogen atom (atom 1): f+ = 0.48422572, making N the most electrophilic site. Most nucleophilic site: atom 4 (C), f− = 0.11826.
